response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience but lacks the core requirements for this role. No professional C++ experience in the last 10 years (only a brief stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no Windows platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle expertise, and no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domain knowledge. Primary stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, which does not align with the C++/Windows/finance profile needed.
strengths: Solid software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and testing focus
Some historical C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on developer tooling
Strong communication skills evidenced by talks, workshops, and teaching
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience (only ~6 months a decade ago)
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server/Oracle experience and no Windows platform focus

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows focus
